name: DL-1 completion semantics — policy-only evidence
reason: DL-1 tasks define completion semantics lanes as plan/doc policy. No runtime code artifact expected until canonical document witness materialization (DL-2) is built. Evidence is the plan structure itself.

name: DL-2 canonical witness schema — schema defined, materialization pending
reason: DL-2 tasks define DocumentWitness schema and identity rules. Schema exists (1 DocumentWitness node in graph), but full canonical materialization pipeline not yet operational. Tasks are correctly done at the definition level.

name: DL-3 namespace correction — governance contract, not runtime code
reason: DL-3 tasks define namespace classification rules and migration procedures. Work product is plan/governance policy. Runtime enforcement depends on DL-5 invariant promotion.

name: DL-4 claim support quality — policy spec, pending DL-2 materialization
reason: DL-4 tasks define claim support grading rules for document completion. Rules are specified but not enforced until DL-2 produces canonical witnesses. Evidence is plan text + claim engine policy.

name: DL-5 gate invariant — advisory invariant defined, fail-closed pending stabilization
reason: DL-5 tasks define machine-checkable invariants for document completion. Advisory mode implemented; fail-closed promotion gated on DL-2 stability. Exception policy and governance behavior specified.

name: DL-6 wording contract — pitch-safe wording defined, dashboard integration pending
reason: DL-6 tasks define wording contracts (forbidden/allowed claim phrasing). Policy text exists in plan. Dashboard surface integration depends on DL-5 invariant promotion and verification status dashboard.
